title: Icewind
description: Icewind is a datapack&resourcepack/mod based on temperature and a lot of more details that make the game immersive.
body:
![Icewind text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d0db91af2c832611f5979ccb89f45316b626ac.png)

## Icewind is a datapack&resourcepack/mod based on temperature and a lot of more details that make the game immersive. That introduces things like:

- New items
- New enchantments
- A lot of more game's mechanics


# To change mod's settings use:

`
/function icewind:settings
`


# Need to know!

- If you are using Icewind...
> as a mod it must be installed on both client and server side
>
> as a datapack you also need to download the Resourcepack
